# Input

Collects short-form text from a user.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/input
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview
  slug="input"
  example={0}
  code={`<Input aria-label="Email" placeholder="hello@stalk-ui.com" />`}
/>

```tsx
<Input aria-label="Email" placeholder="hello@stalk-ui.com" />
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="input"
  example={1}
  code={`<Input invalid aria-label="Email" defaultValue="not-an-email" />`}
/>

```tsx
<Input invalid aria-label="Email" defaultValue="not-an-email" />
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="input"
  example={2}
  code={`<Input disabled aria-label="Read only" defaultValue="acme-corp" />`}
/>

```tsx
<Input disabled aria-label="Read only" defaultValue="acme-corp" />
```

## Props

| Prop        | Type                                                                    | Required | Default | Description |
| ----------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------- | ------- | ----------- |
| `endSlot`   | `ReactNode`                                                             | No       | -       | -           |
| `rootProps` | `Omit<InputRootProps, keyof RootOnlyProps \| 'children' \| 'disabled'>` | No       | -       | -           |
| `startSlot` | `ReactNode`                                                             | No       | -       | -           |

## Variants

| Variant    | Values                   |
| ---------- | ------------------------ |
| `disabled` | `true`                   |
| `invalid`  | `true`                   |
| `size`     | `sm`, `md`, `lg`         |
| `align`    | `start`, `center`, `end` |

## Registry

- Manifest: `/r/input.json`
- Recipe: `input`
- Files: `src/components/ui/input.tsx`
